title: LinuxMC
description: Allows you to run shell commands in-game.
body:
Allows you to run shell commands in-game. **🏳‍🌈 Happy Pride Month!** Why ???? -------- Cuz i wanna OS Compatibility ---------------- 🪟 Windows: **✅ Yes**
🐧 Linux: **✅ Yes**
🍎 MacOS: **🟨 Limited - only v0.3 tested**
Warning ------- Be careful with this plugin. Do not /op random people or give them LinuxMC permissions as they might be abused for [ratting](https://www.techtarget.com/searchsecurity/definition/RAT-remote-access-Trojan) your server, destroying everything and possibly more.
